channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Farage exploiting Henry Nowak’s murder against wishes of his family, says Starmer – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: The real reason Farage has seized on the murder of Henry Nowak

item.title: The Mirror: Keir Starmer says Nigel Farage has shown 'exactly who he is' by exploiting Henry Nowak murder - The Mirror

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Watch in full: Starmer grilled at PMQs after violent clashes over Henry Nowak death

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Labour split as minister criticises party’s attempts to reform welfare
item.description: Labour split as minister criticises party’s attempts to reform welfare
